HUDLocator.name: HUD Locator All in 1 (Cave, Effigy, Eggs, Chests, Players)

changes: - Added option to filter Chest,Junk or both
- Changed configuration folder for better compatibility and performance
- Ground Loot - turned off as default
- Added Ground Loot locator, loot generated by the game can now be seen with this mod, there is a Filter in the config you can search for any item, check Mod Config Page

- Changed config location for better support
- More options and fast config reload

- Start of a major new version, now using the game internal font, better compatibility for all languages, improved quality and visuals
- yours settings might be a little off now with the new font
- added link to the mod configuration page inside the mod menu

- Changed the disatance layout so its close to the tracker element
- Fixed a stale instance bug, so when a cave changes or a user logs off it should not stay on screen
- Bug fix 2
- Fixed Translation bug, now show the exact item again
- Added key remap options
